predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person.

predicates.name: is_immovable_property
predicates.description: The property is an immovable property.

predicates.name: served_as_principal_residence_at_opening_of_succession
predicates.description: The property served as the principal residence of the family at the time of the opening of the succession of the deceased person.

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_rent
predicates.description: The person acquires the right to rent the property.

predicates.name: is_excluded_from_right_to_rent
predicates.description: The person is excluded from the right to rent the property.
